    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_eq_erase_empty_powerset, Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.empty_mem_powerset _), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    rfl
  let f (s : Finset ℕ) := ∑ x ∈ s, x
  have h_map : ∀ s ∈ P, f s ∈ Finset.Icc 0 990 := by
    intro s hs
    rw [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hs
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    refine ⟨zero_le _, (Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hs.1 (λ _ _ ↦ zero_le _)).trans ?_⟩
    exact (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul S 99 (λ x hx ↦ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hx)).2.le)).trans_eq (by rw [h₀]; rfl)
  
  have h_card : (Finset.Icc 0 990).card < P.card := by rw [Finset.card_Icc, hP]; norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to h_map h_card
  rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hA hB

  let S₁ := A \ B
  let S₂ := B \ A
  have h_sum_eq : ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    apply Nat.add_right_cancel (k := ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x)
    rw [Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left A B), Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_right A B), hsum]

  have h_not_empty : ∀ X, X ⊆ S → ∑ x ∈ X, x = 0 → X = ∅ := by
    intro X hX hSum
    rw [Finset.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
    intro x hx
    apply (ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hX hx))).1)).symm
    exact Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp hSum x hx

  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset _ _, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset _ _, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, h_sum_eq⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    have : S₂ = ∅ := h_not_empty S₂ (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _) (by rw [← h_sum_eq, h, Finset.sum_empty])
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty] at h this
    exact hne (Subset.antisymm h this)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    have : S₁ = ∅ := h_not_empty S₁ (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _) (by rw [h_sum_eq, h, Finset.sum_empty])
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty] at h this
    exact hne (Subset.antisymm this h)

let P := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hP : P.card = 1023 := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.2 S.empty_subset), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    norm_num
  let f (s : Finset ℕ) := ∑ x ∈ s, x
  let T := Finset.Icc 1 990
  have hT : T.card = 990 := by rw [Finset.card_Icc]; rfl
  have h_map : ∀ s ∈ P, f s ∈ T := by
    intro s hs
    rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hs
    have hne : s.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 hs.1
    have hsub : s ⊆ S := hs.2
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    constructor
    · rcases hne with ⟨x, hx⟩
      exact le_trans (by norm_num) (le_trans (Finset.mem_Ico.1 (h₁ (hsub hx))).1 (Finset.le_sum_of_mem hx))
    · apply le_trans (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul s 99 (fun x hx => Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.1 (h₁ (hsub hx))).2))
      exact le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 (Finset.card_le_card hsub)) (by rw [h₀]; norm_num)
  have : T.card < P.card := by rw [hP, hT]; norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, heq⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to this h_map
  use A \ B, B \ A
  rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  have hpos : ∀ x ∈ S, 0 < x := fun x hx => lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Finset.mem_Ico.1 (h₁ hx)).1
  have hsum : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x := by
    refine Nat.add_right_cancel (k := ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x) ?_
    rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B), Finset.sdiff_union_inter, heq,
        ← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A), Finset.sdiff_union_inter, Finset.inter_comm]
  refine ⟨?_, (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans hA.2, ?_, (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans hB.2,
    Finset.disjoint_of_subset_right (Finset.sdiff_subset B A) Finset.disjoint_sdiff_left, hsum⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    exact ne_of_lt (Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_ssubset (Finset.ssubset_iff_subset_ne.2 ⟨hsub, hne⟩)
      (fun x hx _ => hpos x (hB.2 hx))) heq
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    exact ne_of_gt (Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_ssubset (Finset.ssubset_iff_subset_ne.2 ⟨hsub, hne.symm⟩)
      (fun x hx _ => hpos x (hA.2 hx))) heq

let P := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hP : P.card = 2 ^ 10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (Finset.empty_subset S)), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    rfl
  have h_sum : ∀ s ∈ P, ∑ x ∈ s, x ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1000 := by
    intro s hs
    have hs_sub : s ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hs)
    have hs_ne : s.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_of_ne_empty (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hs)
    constructor
    · apply Nat.one_le_of_lt
      refine Finset.sum_pos (fun x hx => ?_) hs_ne
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hs_sub hx))).1
    · apply le_trans (Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hs_sub (fun _ _ _ => zero_le _))
      apply le_of_lt
      calc ∑ x ∈ S, x < S.card * 100 := Finset.sum_lt_card_mul_of_forall (by rw [← Finset.card_pos, h₀]; norm_num) (fun x hx => (Nat.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hx)).2)
        _ = 1000 := by rw [h₀]; rfl
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to h_sum (by rw [hP, Finset.card_Icc]; norm_num)
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    apply hne
    apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_sum_eq hsub hsum
    intro x hx
    exact ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hB) hx))).1)
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hA))
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    apply hne
    symm
    apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_sum_eq hsub hsum.symm
    intro x hx
    exact ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hA) hx))).1)
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hB))
  · exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  · have h1 : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter _ _), Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
    have h2 : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter _ _), Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
    rw [h1, h2, Finset.inter_comm A B] at hsum
    exact Nat.add_right_cancel hsum

let f := fun s ↦ ∑ x ∈ s, x
  have h_bound : ∀ x ∈ S.powerset, f x ∈ Finset.range 1000 := fun x hx ↦ by
    rw [Finset.mem_range, Finset.mem_powerset] at hx ⊢
    calc ∑ y ∈ x, y ≤ x.card * 99 := Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul x _ 99 
        (fun y hy ↦ Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hx hy))).2)
      _ ≤ 10 * 99 := Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 ((Finset.card_le_of_subset hx).trans_eq h₀)
      _ < 1000 := by norm_num
  have h_card : (Finset.range 1000).card < S.powerset.card := by
    rw [Finset.card_range, Finset.card_powerset, h₀]; norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, heq⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to h_card h_bound
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA),
         ?_, (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB), disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    apply hne; apply Subset.antisymm h
    rw [← Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset, Finset.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
    intro x hx
    have : ∑ y ∈ B \ A, y = 0 := by rw [Finset.sum_sdiff h] at heq; exact (self_eq_add_right.mp heq.symm)
    exact ((Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1))).1.trans_le 
      (by norm_num)).ne' (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp this x hx)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    apply hne; apply Subset.antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp ?_) h
    rw [Finset.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
    intro x hx
    have : ∑ y ∈ A \ B, y = 0 := by rw [Finset.sum_sdiff h] at heq; exact (self_eq_add_right.mp heq)
    exact ((Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1))).1.trans_le 
      (by norm_num)).ne' (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp this x hx)
  · rw [← Finset.sdiff_inter_self_right A B, Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left A B),
        heq, ← Finset.sdiff_inter_self_right B A, Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left B A),
        Finset.inter_comm]

let P := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hP : P.card = 1023 := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr S.empty_subset), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    norm_num
  let f (X : Finset ℕ) := ∑ x ∈ X, x
  let T := Finset.Icc 10 990
  have hT : T.card = 981 := by rw [Finset.card_Icc]; norm_num
  have h_maps : ∀ X ∈ P, f X ∈ T := by
    intro X hX
    rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset, Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at hX
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    constructor
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hX.1
      exact (le_of_mem_Ico (h₁ (hX.2 hx))).1.trans (Finset.single_le_sum (λ _ _ ↦ zero_le _) hx)
    · calc ∑ x ∈ X, x ≤ ∑ x ∈ X, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum (λ x hx ↦ le_of_lt (mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hX.2 hx))).2)
        _ = X.card * 99 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        _ ≤ S.card * 99 := Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 (Finset.card_le_card hX.2)
        _ = 990 := by rw [h₀]; norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to (by rw [hP, hT]; norm_num) h_maps
  rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    have : ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x = 0 := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_sdiff hsub] at hsum
      exact Nat.add_left_cancel hsum
    have : B \ A = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (λ x hx ↦ 
      ne_of_gt ((le_of_mem_Ico (h₁ (hB.2 (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _ hx)))).1.trans_lt (by norm_num)) 
      (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp this x hx))
    exact hne (hsub.antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this))
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hA.2
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    have : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = 0 := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_sdiff hsub] at hsum
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel hsum
    have : A \ B = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (λ x hx ↦ 
      ne_of_gt ((le_of_mem_Ico (h₁ (hA.2 (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _ hx)))).1.trans_lt (by norm_num)) 
      (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp this x hx))
    exact hne ((Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this).antisymm hsub)
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hB.2
  · simp only [f] at hsum
    rw [← Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left A B), ← Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_right A B), hsum]
    simp [Finset.inter_comm]

let P := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hP : P.card = 2 ^ 10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (Finset.empty_subset _)), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  let max_sum := 10 * 99
  let f := fun s => ∑ x ∈ s, x
  have h_im : ∀ s ∈ P, f s ∈ Finset.Icc 10 max_sum := by
    intro s hs
    rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hs
    obtain ⟨hne, hsub⟩ := hs
    have hne' : s.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne
    constructor
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hne'
      apply le_trans _ (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => zero_le _) hx)
      exact (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hsub hx))).1
    · apply le_trans (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul s 99 (fun x hx => Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hsub hx))).2))
      apply Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 (trans (Finset.card_le_of_subset hsub) (le_of_eq h₀))
  have h_card : P.card > (Finset.Icc 10 max_sum).card := by
    rw [hP, Nat.card_Icc]
    norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to h_card h_im
  rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    apply hne
    have : ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x = 0 := by
      rw [← Nat.add_right_eq_self (∑ x ∈ A, x), ← hsum, ← Finset.sum_sdiff hsub]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff] at this
    have hBA : B \ A = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x hx => by
      specialize this x hx
      have x_ge_10 : 10 ≤ x := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hB.2 (Finset.sdiff_subset B A hx)))).1
      linarith)
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at hBA
    exact Finset.subset_antisymm hsub hBA
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hA.2
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    apply hne
    symm
    have : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = 0 := by
      rw [← Nat.add_right_eq_self (∑ x ∈ B, x), hsum, ← Finset.sum_sdiff hsub]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff] at this
    have hAB : A \ B = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x hx => by
      specialize this x hx
      have x_ge_10 : 10 ≤ x := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hA.2 (Finset.sdiff_subset A B hx)))).1
      linarith)
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at hAB
    exact Finset.subset_antisymm hAB hsub
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hB.2
  · exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  · rw [Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_left _ _), Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_right _ _), hsum, Finset.inter_comm]

let P := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hP : P.card = 1023 := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr S.empty_subset), Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    norm_num

  let f (A : Finset ℕ) := ∑ x ∈ A, x
  let T := Finset.Icc 1 990
  have h_map : ∀ A ∈ P, f A ∈ T := by
    intro A hA
    rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]
    constructor
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hA.1
      exact le_trans (by norm_num) (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => zero_le _) hx)
    · apply le_trans (Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hA.2 (fun _ _ => zero_le _))
      apply le_trans (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul S 99 (fun x hx => Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hx)).2))
      rw [h₀]; norm_num

  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to 
    (by rw [hP, Finset.card_Icc]; norm_num : T.card < P.card) h_map
  rw [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB

  let S₁ := A \ B
  let S₂ := B \ A
  have h_sum_eq : ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    dsimp [f] at hsum
    rw [← Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_left A B), 
        ← Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_right A B), hsum, Finset.inter_comm]

  have h_empty_imp (X Y : Finset ℕ) (hY : Y ⊆ S) (heq : ∑ x ∈ X \ Y, x = ∑ x ∈ Y \ X, x) (h : X \ Y = ∅) : Y \ X = ∅ := by
    rw [h, Finset.sum_empty] at heq
    exact Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem fun x hx => (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) 
      (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hY (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _ hx)))).1).ne' 
      (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (fun _ _ => zero_le _) |> (·.mp heq.symm) _ hx)

  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, ?, (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hA.2, ?, (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _).trans hB.2, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, h_sum_eq⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    have h' := h_empty_imp A B hB.2 h_sum_eq h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h h'
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm h h')
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h
    have h' := h_empty_imp B A hA.2 h_sum_eq.symm h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h h'
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm h' h)

let P := S.powerset.filter Finset.Nonempty
  have hP : P.card = 1023 := by
    rw [← Finset.erase_eq_filter_ne_self_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_powerset.2 S.empty_subset),
      Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.2 S.empty_subset),
      Finset.card_powerset, h₀]; norm_num
  have h_map : ∀ s ∈ P, ∑ x in s, x ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro s hs
    rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hs
    obtain ⟨hsub, ⟨x, hx⟩⟩ := hs
    rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hsub
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor
    · exact (le_of_lt (h₁ (hsub hx)).1).trans (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ zero_le _) hx)
    · exact (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul s 99 (fun x hx ↦ le_of_lt (h₁ (hsub hx)).2)).trans
        (mul_le_mul_left _ (Finset.card_le_card hsub) |>.trans_eq (by rw [h₀]; rfl))
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to
    (by rw [hP, Finset.card_Icc]; norm_num) h_map
  rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hA hB; obtain ⟨hA, -⟩ := hA; obtain ⟨hB, -⟩ := hB
  let S₁ := A \ B; let S₂ := B \ A
  have h_eq : ∑ x in S₁, x = ∑ x in S₂, x := by
    rw [Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_left ..),
      Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sub (Finset.inter_subset_right ..), hsum, Finset.inter_comm]

      (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) |>.mp this x hx))
    exact hne (hsub.antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this))
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans hA_sub
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Ne, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro hsub
    have : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = 0 := by
      rw [hsum, ← Finset.sum_union (disjoint_sdiff_inter A B), Finset.sdiff_union_inter, Finset.inter_eq_left.mpr hsub]; simp
    have : A \ B = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x hx => (h_pos x (hA_sub (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1)).ne' 
      (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) |>.mp this x hx))
    exact hne ((Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this).antisymm hsub)
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans hB_sub
  · dsimp [f] at hsum
    rw [←Finset.sum_union (disjoint_sdiff_inter A B), Finset.sdiff_union_inter] at hsum
    rw [←Finset.sum_union (disjoint_sdiff_inter B A), Finset.sdiff_union_inter, Finset.inter_comm] at hsum
